description: Reliable AI matrix multiplication vector for the three-Caravel TMR UART cocotb simulation.

partcl_reference.note: The harness instantiates the real PARTCL 8x8 mat_mult_wb RTL in each replicated Caravel endpoint. The UART test drives a 2x2 payload into the top-left corner of the real 8x8 array and zero-fills the rest before copying C00, C01, C10, and C11 into the modeled X1/ReRAM words.

fault_cases.name: one_bad_user_rx_lane
fault_cases.location: external user TX lane before peripheral RX voter
fault_cases.expected_external_result: matrix command is corrected before reaching all three Caravels

fault_cases.name: one_bad_caravel_ai_result
fault_cases.location: one replicated Caravel stores C00 as 0x0000000D
fault_cases.why: two correct Caravel TX streams outvote one incorrect stream

fault_cases.name: two_bad_caravel_ai_results
fault_cases.location: two replicated Caravels store C00 as 0x0000000D
fault_cases.why: two incorrect streams form the majority, which is outside TMR correction capability
